title: IEC 62304 Verification Case
description: Field-aligned with crates/trustsc-governance/src/lib.rs::VerificationCase. Relevant to IEC 62304 §5.5-§5.8 (unit/integration/system verification) and §6.2 (problem/modification analysis) — see docs/iec62304/04-development-implementation-and-testing.md.

requirement.description: The Requirement id this case verifies. trustsc_governance::ComplianceProgram::validate() rejects a VerificationCase whose requirement does not reference a known Requirement (an 'orphan verification').

evidence.description: Where the verification evidence lives — a test name, a --verify-ui report path, a baker report.json, etc.
